summary: Wall Street closed higher on Wednesday as investors assessed mixed PPI data and solid second-quarter earnings reports.

headline: PNC Financial Analysts Boost Their Forecasts After Strong Q2 Results
summary: PNC Financial Group reported strong Q2 results and raised full-year revenue outlook. Analysts have a positive outlook on the stock, with revised price targets. Stock rose 0.4% to $255.04.

raw.headline: PNC Financial Analysts Boost Their Forecasts After Strong Q2 Results

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on PNC Financial Services Gr, Raises Price Target to $284
summary: Barclays  analyst Jason Goldberg   maintains PNC Financial Services Gr (NYSE:PNC) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $277 to $284.

headline: Finding Value In "Everything Else"
summary: Fiduciary Management identifies value in traditional firms overlooked during the AI frenzy, such as FTI Consulting. Read the full analysis for more details.
